title: ファル子の愛情ブレンド☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hehe, looks like your cold's finally cleared up! ☆

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Yes, and all thanks to you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One evening, a few days ago...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Falcon, I'm perfectly capable of handling this myself, so you needn't worry... Cough!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But, but, that looks like one nasty cold! Let me
take care of you.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... When you have a cold, you're supposed
to drink ginger tea, right? Oh, but is it different
for you in Germany?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: We usually drink herbal tea, if you must know...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Herbal tea! Got it! Wait, you probably have, like,
a secret family recipe, don't you? Great! I can
make it for you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Your recipe notebook is over here, right? And I
guess you also put your dried herbs with it
somewhere?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Ah! You're making a mess of things!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Tja... You never listen. I'll write down the recipe
for you, so give me two minutes.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
All righty! While the kettle's heating up, I need to
prepare the herb blend! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... 3.25 grams of dried chamomile, 1.27
grams of sage, and 1.06 grams of elderflower...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Wow, it's down to the decimals! And you have to
blend nine different herbs?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Eeeasy does it—eek, I poured way too much!
Okay, the hot water should be... this hot maybe?
And how long do I steep this for?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: H-how's it taste? I hope it's good enough...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
You added a little too much lemongrass. And you
let it steep too long—by approximately fifteen
seconds.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Whoa, you can tell?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But, um... just 'cause it tastes a little off doesn't
mean it's bad, right? I made it with pleeeenty of
love! ☆

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
(It's nowhere near a perfect brew... However, this
"love" is...)

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...Yes, the results of this brew are very good, just
as you claimed.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Right? Us Umadols have lots of love to give. It's super powerful! ☆
